title: bridge-matrix: as_transaction body limit 1MiB but Matrix events can be larger
description: bridge-matrix/src/bridge.rs: DefaultBodyLimit::max(1024*1024) caps incoming AS transaction body at 1MiB. The Matrix AS spec has no explicit per-transaction size limit; homeservers may batch many events. A large room with many messages in a transaction could exceed 1MiB, causing axum to reject the entire transaction with 413, and the homeserver to retry. The bridge will never make progress on that transaction. Should either increase the limit or document the constraint in bridge.toml.
